title: ballota nigra var. alba
intro: Ballota nigra var. alba, also known as white black horehound, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family, characterized by its white flowers and minty fragrance. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which make it effective in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Ballota nigra var. alba can be used as a tea, tincture, or infusion to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
